positive: An ethereal, stylized minimalist depiction of a celestial wanderer; the subject is a large, graceful silhouette of a fox surrounded by orbiting rings of glowing, arcane constellations and crescent moons. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, featuring clean, graphic lines and highly stylized fauna. Use a deep indigo and sapphire color palette accented by brilliant, glowing gold and mint green light sources. The overall aesthetic should be high-contrast vector art with a cosmic, dreamlike mood, optimized for apparel printing. Minimal background detail, focusing on the crisp silhouette against the vibrant cosmos.
negative: blur, low resolution, messy, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, fuzzy, noisy, grainy, messy composition
